---
title: "Portfolio"
listing:
  contents: assignments
  sort: "date asc"
  fields: [title, date]
---

Welcome!

## Course Lessons

- [a00: Setup and Hello World](assignments/a00.html)
- [a01: Introduction to Literate Analysis Using Quarto](assignments/a01_quarto_literate_analysis.html)
- [a02: Tidy Data](assignments/a02.html)
- [a03: Cleaning and Wrangling data](assignments/a03.html)
- [a04: Data Visualization](assignments/a04.html)
- [a05: Plotting with ggplot2 and leaflet](assignments/a05.html)
